prestazioni: Engine: M96/70S (3.6L twin-turbocharged flat-6) with a custom GTX3582R Gen2 turbo upgrade from Garrett, paired with a billet compressor wheel and 0.82 A/R turbine housing for optimized spool and 650+ WHP capability on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller, custom 4-inch titanium downpipes with 200-cell catalytic converters from Fabspeed, and a CSF high-flow intercooler with integrated water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit).

Drivetrain: Reinforced 6-speed manual transmission (G96/50) with a Guard Transmission Services short shifter, upgraded dual-disc clutch (Sachs Performance 3000 series), and a Quaife ATB differential with 40% preload for aggressive launches. Rear half-shafts are replaced with billet units from Guard, and the front CV joints are upgraded to Porsche 997 GT3-spec components for durability under high torque.

Suspension & Brakes: Full Ohlins TTX46 coilover kit with 24-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts, and custom valving for the 996 Turbo’s 51mm strut diameter. Front and rear sway bars are replaced with H&R 24mm adjustable units, and the subframe is reinforced with a Tarett Engineering billet aluminum brace. Braking is handled by a full AP Racing Radi-CAL BBK (380mm front, 356mm rear) with R4S calipers, 2-piece rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Custom RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) style widebody kit with hand-rolled fenders, extended 50mm front and 70mm rear overfenders, and integrated carbon fiber side skirts. The kit includes a custom front splitter with integrated canards (997 GT3-style) and a ducktail rear spoiler with a carbon fiber Gurney flap for downforce. All panels are fabricated from 2x2 twill carbon fiber by VIS Racing and finished in Porsche ‘Gulf Blue’ with matte clear coat.

Wheels & Tires: BBS LM-R 19x10.5 ET25 front and 19x12.5 ET30 rear wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 335/30/19 rear). The wheels feature custom gold hardware and are shod with H&R TRAK+ 15mm spacers to fill the widebody arches. Lug bolts are replaced with titanium units from ARP for weight savings.

Interior & Aero: Full carbon fiber interior overhaul with a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport 6-point bolt-in) wrapped in Alcantara, Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub. Exterior aero includes a custom front diffuser with integrated LED fog lights (Lux H8 V4), a rear diffuser with dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (Fabspeed Valvetronic system), and a custom engine bay with carbon fiber intake plenums (IPD) and a titanium strut brace from BBi Autosport.
